title: INTERAKTYWNE REJESTRY DEZYNFEKCJI I ZUŻYCIA ŚRODKÓW DEZYNFEKCYJNYCH, WJAZDU POJAZDÓW NA FERMĘ, WEJŚĆ DO KURNIKÓW, ZWALCZANIA GRYZONI ORAZ DZIENNYCH KONTROLI STADA DROBIU
description: Interactive registers for recording disinfection use, vehicle entries, personnel movements, rodent control, and daily poultry flock inspections ensure compliance with national HPAI biosecurity regulations. These freely available Word and Excel templates from veterinary authorities help producers collect and analyze farm biosecurity data for business optimization and regulatory audits.
